heading: Prohibition on smoking on Amtrak trains
label: 24323 Prohibition on smoking on Amtrak trains
notes: References in TextThe date of enactment of this section, referred to in subsec. (a), is the date of enactment of title II of div. B of , which was approved .Pub. L. 117–58Nov. 15, 2021

children.heading: .—Prohibition
children.label: a .—Prohibition
children.text: Beginning on the date of enactment of this section, Amtrak shall prohibit smoking, including the use of electronic cigarettes, onboard all Amtrak trains.

children.heading: .—Electronic Cigarette Defined
children.label: b .—Electronic Cigarette Defined
children.text: In this section, the term “electronic cigarette” means a device that delivers nicotine or other substances to a user of the device in the form of a vapor that is inhaled to simulate the experience of smoking.
